_comment: Sprint 10 item 1 'design': steady-state realistic load — 300 conns, 30 msg/s aggregate, mix ~80% send / ~10% typing / ~5% mark_read (typing_every=10, read_every=20). assert_no_seq_gaps turns the delivery guarantee into a continuously-checked property (test plan). Groups deferred to the hot-channel slice — this is the paired-DM graph. assert_ack_p99_ms stays at the loose 25.0 on purpose: item 6's 5 ms is the *post-optimization* target and item 7 tightens this gate to measured-p99 + 50% only after the fix loop measures it — do not assert a threshold you have not measured. api_key injected via OPN_LOADGEN_API_KEY. Run via `just perf` on the core-pinned perf stack.
